chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-283 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 2574/23 07-05-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Prem Kumar @ Parmanand, Advocate for respondent No.3. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 19.04.2024. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
